delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from a PDF
delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using the PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned file.

merge-pdf-bookmarks-using-aspose.title: Merge Bookmarks from One PDF into Another
merge-pdf-bookmarks-using-aspose.description: Demonstrates how to export bookmarks from a source PDF as XML and import them into a target PDF, preserving the original order using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page, and hierarchy level to a CSV file.

create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-hierarchical-pdf-bookmarks.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to PdfBookmarkEditor, build a chapter/section bookmark hierarchy, and save the PDF with the new bookmarks.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.description: Demonstrates extracting bookmarks from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor, converting the hierarchical bookmark structure into a custom model, and serializing it to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

import-bookmarks-from-json.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON file with bookmark definitions, map them to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and add the hierarchy to an existing PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add Child Bookmarks Under a Parent Bookmark
add-child-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a parent bookmark (e.g., a chapter) and attach child bookmarks representing sections using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

add-top-level-blue-bookmark.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to First Page
add-top-level-blue-bookmark.description: Demonstrates how to create a new top-level bookmark that points to page 1 of a PDF and set its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.description: Shows how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

delete-bookmark-verify-removal.title: Delete a Bookmark and Verify Removal
delete-bookmark-verify-removal.description: Shows how to remove a specific bookmark from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and then confirm the deletion by extracting the remaining bookmarks.

add-bookmarks-verify-count.title: Add Bookmarks and Verify Count in PDF
add-bookmarks-verify-count.description: Demonstrates adding page bookmarks to a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, saving the file, then extracting the bookmarks to confirm the expected number.

update-pdf-bookmark-title.title: Update PDF Bookmark Title Using MemoryStream
update-pdf-bookmark-title.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, modify a bookmark title using PdfBookmarkEditor, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.description: Demonstrates how to open encrypted PDF files with a password, remove all bookmarks using the PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned PDFs in a batch loop.

batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks
collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically collapse selected bookmarks in a PDF by setting their Open property to false using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

import-bookmarks-from-csv.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-csv.description: Demonstrates reading a CSV file, building a hierarchical bookmark structure, and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
add-external-url-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create bookmarks that open external web URLs in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Import OFD Bookmarks into a PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an OFD file, extract its bookmarks as XML, and import them into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page 10
update-bookmark-destination-to-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to locate a bookmark in a PDF by its object ID using Aspose.Pdf, change its destination to page 10, and save the modified document.

adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert blank pages at the beginning of a PDF and shift existing bookmark destinations to keep them accurate, using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor and exporting its complete bookmark hierarchy to an XML file for external documentation tools.

set-bookmark-zoom-150-percent.title: Set Bookmark Zoom to 150% Using PdfBookmarkEditor
set-bookmark-zoom-150-percent.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, recursively traverse its bookmark hierarchy, set each bookmark's page display zoom to 150%, and save the updated document.

validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Against a Generated Table of Contents
validate-pdf-bookmarks-against-toc.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks using the Facades API and compares their page numbers with a generated TOC file to identify mismatches, missing, or extra entries.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark hierarchy.

create-bookmarks-for-each-image.title: Create Bookmarks for Each Image in a PDF
create-bookmarks-for-each-image.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, locate image resources, and add a bookmark for each image that links to its page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, identify and remove duplicates based on title and page number, and recreate a clean set of unique bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a directory, add a "Reviewed" bookmark on the last page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the updated PDFs to an output folder.

rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using Translation Dictionary
rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over a translation dictionary, renames matching bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor.ModifyBookmarks, and saves the updated document.

import-bookmarks-from-database.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-database.description: Shows how to retrieve bookmark titles and page numbers (simulated as database records) and add them to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case
update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.description: Shows how to extract PDF bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert each title to title case while preserving predefined proper nouns, and save the modified PDF.

add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that executes a JavaScript alert using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

color-pdf-bookmarks-by-content.title: Color PDF Bookmarks Based on Content
color-pdf-bookmarks-by-content.description: Shows how to read existing PDF bookmarks, set their title color to red for warnings and green for informational sections, and rewrite the bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-bookmark-to-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
create-bookmark-to-named-destination.description: Shows how to add a bookmark that references a named destination defined elsewhere in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV for Excel
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv__v2.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its bookmark hierarchy with PdfBookmarkEditor, and writes each bookmark's title, level, and destination page number to a CSV file that can be opened directly in Excel.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to extract the hierarchical bookmark structure from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and serialize it to a JSON file with title, level, and page number for each node.
